title: carlina × ceretana
intro: Carlina × ceretana, also known as the hybrid carline thistle or Carline's thistle, is a rare and endangered plant species resulting from the cross between Carlina acaulis and Carlina sulcata. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European herbalism, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carlina × ceretana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Carlina × ceretana often involve infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which can be used internally or applied topically, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
